meaning: n.[俗] 违背习俗,不合情理之事,过失,罪过,[数学] 正弦函数
examples: Chocolate equals sin in most people's lexicon.
Sin is a harsh tyrant in your life. But Christ not only died for our sins, he died to sin.
Ha mostrado un compromiso sin fallas en pro de la paz y el desarrollo.
They also know that sloth may be a sin but, if practiced wisely, is also a virtue.
